message:
fix: prevent 429 rate-limit from triggering login redirect loop (#10223)

When kc-agent returns 401 (cluster unreachable), the frontend floods
the backend with retries, triggering the rate limiter. The /api/me
verification probe then receives 429, which was treated as an auth
failure — clearing the session and redirecting to login in a loop.

Two fixes:
- handle401() now treats 429 from /api/me as "session still valid"
- refreshUser() uses cached user on 429 instead of clearing auth

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
